item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.6 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * feat: add quit apps plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/67 * feat: add app hotkey plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/65 * fix: replace visibility switch with checkbox in drag preview by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/69 * chore: add GitHub Actions workflow for Homebrew Cask updates by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/71
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.5...v1.0.6
